name: NanoClaw
description: NanoClaw is a small, auditable Claude assistant. One Node process and a handful of files — easy to read end-to-end. Each Claude agent runs in its own Linux container with real filesystem isolation, not application-level permission checks.

notes.text: After CT creation, run `pct enter <ID>` then `su - nanoclaw && cd ~/nanoclaw-v2 && bash nanoclaw.sh` to finish setup interactively. The wizard installs Node, pnpm, Docker, sets up the OneCLI vault, and prompts for your Anthropic API key (or 'subscription' for Claude Code login).
Update mechanism tracks the upstream `qwibitai/nanoclaw` default branch. Updates may include breaking changes; review release notes before upgrading.
